title: Electrical Service Closeout
description: Mandatory service closeout form covering photos, service type, attendance, variations, delays, works completed, system status, additional works, conditional Test and Tag and emergency lighting summaries, finish time, and site close out.

fields.label: Site Arrival Before Photos
fields.additionalDetails: Take BEFORE photos now using camera. Capture site condition prior to commencing works. Job cannot proceed without photos.

fields.label: Specify Service Type
fields.additionalDetails: Provide a clear description of the service performed.

fields.label: Start Time
fields.additionalDetails: Enter start time in HH:MM format.

fields.label: Office Notified if Exceeding Estimate
fields.additionalDetails: If this job is likely to exceed the estimated time, have you notified office and or management?

fields.label: Variation Notification Acknowledgement
fields.additionalDetails: You must notify office and or management via phone, SMS or ServiceM8 before continuing works beyond the estimated timeframe. Please do not contact the client directly unless they are physically on site. All variations are to be managed through office and or management.

fields.label: Time Notified
fields.additionalDetails: Enter notification time in HH:MM format.

fields.label: Works Completed
fields.additionalDetails: Enter works completed using short bullet points. Start each line with -. No paragraphs. Example format: - Isolated power to DB-1; - Replaced faulty contactor.

fields.label: Office Notified of Delay
fields.additionalDetails: Has office and or management been notified of this delay?

fields.label: Delay Notification Acknowledgement
fields.additionalDetails: Please notify office and or management via phone, SMS or ServiceM8 as soon as possible. Delays must be communicated to ensure tracking and reporting.

fields.label: Action Required Follow Up Needed
fields.additionalDetails: Enter works completed using bullet points only. Start each line with -.

fields.label: Minor Works Details
fields.additionalDetails: Enter works completed using bullet points only. Start each line with -.

fields.label: Major Works Details
fields.additionalDetails: Enter works completed using bullet points only. Start each line with -.

fields.label: ETA for Quote to Client
fields.additionalDetails: Enter quote ETA as a date and short note.

fields.label: Test Tag Report Uploaded
fields.additionalDetails: Confirm Test and Tag register or report has been uploaded or provided to office.

fields.label: Finish Time
fields.additionalDetails: Record actual finish time before leaving site. Enter time in HH:MM format.

fields.label: Completion After Photos
fields.additionalDetails: Take AFTER photos now using camera. Capture completed works before leaving site. Job cannot be closed without photos.
